name: Tinymist Typst Preview
desktopOnly: siyuan-tinymist only works on the desktop client (tinymist child process requires Node integration).

setting.title: Tinymist Settings
setting.tinymistPathDesc: Path to the tinymist binary. Leave empty to use the bundled/downloaded one.
setting.previewPortDesc: Local port for the tinymist preview WebSocket server (0 = auto).
